fields.label: Gemini API Key
fields.description: Enter your Google Gemini API key

fields.label: Gemini Model
fields.options:
gemini-3.1-flash-lite
gemini-3.5-flash
gemini-3.1-pro-preview
gemini-2.5-flash
gemini-2.5-flash-lite
gemini-2.5-pro
fields.description: Model used for OCR extraction. gemini-3.1-flash-lite is the cheapest (best cost/accuracy for statements); gemini-3.5-flash / gemini-2.5-flash are the balanced defaults; the pro models are the most accurate but most expensive.

fields.label: Enable Chatbot
fields.description: Enable or disable the AI Chatbot feature in the portal

fields.label: Subject Template
fields.description: Placeholders: {division}, {region}, {month}. Leave blank to use the built-in default.

fields.label: Greeting
fields.description: First line, e.g. 'Dear CFA,'. Leave blank for the built-in default.

fields.label: Intro Line
fields.description: Bold line above the table, e.g. 'Approved for billing:'. Leave blank for default.

fields.label: RSM Heading
fields.description: Heading before the notes, e.g. 'Dear RSM,'. Leave blank for default.

fields.label: RSM Notes
fields.description: One bullet per line. Leave blank for the built-in default notes.

fields.label: Signature
fields.description: Closing signature block, one line per row. Leave blank for the built-in default. Also used on reject/reroute notices.
